items.tab_content: Uses crisp shadcn hierarchy, semantic tokens, and concise product copy so the component reads like a real SaaS interface. The tab content field gives the tabs element enough real content to judge spacing, hierarchy, and responsive behavior.
Keeps the first panel available as the default and gives editors clear fallback content when a tab panel is still empty.
Pairs each tab label with practical content so seeded examples stay useful in previews and frontend checks.

default_tab: Default Tab for Tabs: Customer Evidence Hub
